summary: Iteration 259 - Dual-Track Economy System Testing Complete. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified. Features tested: 3 subscription tiers (Discovery/Resonance/Sovereign), 7 learning packs in 3 categories (mini/mastery/business), 4 commission tiers (0%/6.75%/13.5%/27%), Polymath All-Access Pass ($1,797/year), Stripe checkout integration for paid tiers/packs/polymath, free tier direct activation, downgrade to Discovery.
critical_code_review_comments: economy.py: SUBSCRIPTION_TIERS dict defines 3 tiers (discovery/resonance/sovereign) with price_monthly, features, marketplace_discount, max_project_slots, fidelity, forge_access, max_commission_tier, color
economy.py: LEARNING_PACKS list has 7 packs across 3 categories (mini: $87-177, mastery: $447-897, business: $1347+)
economy.py: COMMISSION_TIERS list has 4 levels (Observer 0%, Practitioner 6.75%, Professional 13.5%, Sovereign 27%)
economy.py: POLYMATH_PASS defines $1,797/year all-access pass with Sovereign tier + all packs + Level 4 commissions
economy.py: GET /tiers returns tiers array, current_tier, current_tier_data
economy.py: GET /packs returns packs with purchased status, categories, polymath_pass, has_polymath
economy.py: GET /commissions returns tiers, domain_levels, max_allowed_level, total_earned, recent_earnings
economy.py: GET /profile returns unified subscription, packs_owned, total_packs, commission_domains, total_commission_earned
economy.py: POST /subscribe creates Stripe checkout for paid tiers, directly activates free Discovery tier
economy.py: POST /purchase-pack creates Stripe checkout for pack purchase, checks if already purchased
economy.py: POST /purchase-polymath creates Stripe checkout for Polymath pass, checks if already polymath
economy.py: POST /downgrade switches to free Discovery tier without Stripe
economy.py: GET /checkout-status/{session_id} polls payment status and fulfills on paid confirmation
EconomyPage.js: TierCard component renders tier with icon, price, features, Current badge, upgrade button
EconomyPage.js: PackCard component renders pack with domain icon, description, modules, price, Purchase button
EconomyPage.js: CommissionRow component renders commission tier with level, name, rate, status
EconomyPage.js: 3 tabs (Subscriptions/Learning Packs/Brokerage) with data-testid economy-tabs
EconomyPage.js: Economy stats bar shows subscription tier, packs owned, total commission
SmartDock.js: Economy button with Crown icon navigates to /economy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 259 verified Dual-Track Economy System: (1) GET /api/economy/tiers returns 3 subscription tiers (Discovery=Free, Resonance=$44.99/mo, Sovereign=$89.99/mo) with features, max_commission_tier, marketplace_discount. (2) GET /api/economy/packs returns 7 learning packs in 3 categories (mini: $87-177, mastery: $447-897, business: $1347+) with purchased status and category_data. (3) GET /api/economy/commissions returns 4 commission tiers (Observer 0%, Practitioner 6.75%, Professional 13.5%, Sovereign 27%) with max_allowed_level based on subscription tier. (4) GET /api/economy/profile returns unified economy profile. (5) POST /api/economy/subscribe creates Stripe checkout for paid tiers, directly activates free Discovery tier. (6) POST /api/economy/purchase-pack creates Stripe checkout for pack purchase. (7) POST /api/economy/purchase-polymath creates Stripe checkout for Polymath All-Access Pass ($1,797/year). (8) POST /api/economy/downgrade switches to free Discovery tier. (9) GET /api/economy/checkout-status/{session_id} polls payment status. (10) Frontend: Economy page at /economy with 3 tabs (Subscriptions/Learning Packs/Brokerage). (11) Frontend: data-testids: economy-title, economy-header, economy-tabs, tab-subscriptions, tab-packs, tab-commissions, tier-discovery, tier-resonance, tier-sovereign, polymath-pass, buy-polymath, pack-{id}, buy-pack-{id}, pack-category-mini/mastery/business, commission-level-1/2/3/4, earnings-summary, economy-stats. (12) Frontend: SmartDock has Economy button (dock-economy) with Crown icon. (13) Stripe test key generates real checkout sessions (test mode). (14) Commission max level gated by subscription tier (Discovery=L2, Resonance=L3, Sovereign=L4, Polymath=L4).

backend_get_tiers.details: GET /api/economy/tiers returns 3 subscription tiers with correct pricing

backend_tiers_features.details: Each tier has features array with multiple items

backend_packs_categories.details: Packs have 3 categories: mini, mastery, business

backend_packs_purchase_status.details: Each pack has purchased boolean status

backend_packs_category_data.details: Each pack has category_data with name, range, color

backend_commissions_max_level.details: Response includes max_allowed_level based on subscription tier

backend_profile_subscription.details: Profile includes subscription tier and tier_data

backend_subscribe_discovery.details: POST /api/economy/subscribe with discovery tier activates free tier directly

backend_subscribe_paid_tier.details: POST /api/economy/subscribe with paid tier returns Stripe checkout URL

backend_subscribe_requires_origin.details: POST /api/economy/subscribe with paid tier requires origin_url

backend_downgrade.details: POST /api/economy/downgrade switches to free Discovery tier

backend_checkout_status_invalid.details: GET /api/economy/checkout-status with invalid session returns error

frontend_economy_stats.details: Economy stats bar shows subscription tier, packs owned, total commission

frontend_tier_discovery.details: Discovery tier card renders with Free price and Current badge

frontend_tier_resonance.details: Resonance tier card renders with $44.99/mo and Upgrade button

frontend_tier_sovereign.details: Sovereign tier card renders with $89.99/mo and Upgrade button

frontend_polymath_pass.details: Polymath All-Access Pass card renders with $1,797/year

frontend_pack_category_mastery.details: Mastery Deep-Dives category renders with 2 packs ($447-$897)

frontend_earnings_summary.details: Earnings summary renders with total earned and max level

frontend_smartdock_economy.details: SmartDock has Economy button (dock-economy) with Crown icon
